items.title: Cleaning and transformation
items.description: After a faithful load, you handle missing values, outliers, and type fixes in cleaning—starting from the dtypes and columns you chose at read time.

items.title: GroupBy and joins
items.description: Multiple tables loaded separately are merged or aggregated with groupby/join operations once keys and dtypes align across frames.

items.title: Train / validation / test splits
items.description: Loading often reads the full dataset; split strategy (random, stratified, temporal) is applied immediately after load so preprocessing respects partition boundaries.

items.title: Data leakage
items.description: Computing global statistics on the entire loaded frame before splitting leaks test information into train preprocessing—awareness at load time prevents this mistake.
